summary:
The only substance among these options possessing a permanent dipole is water, owing to its bent structure and uneven electron distribution from differing atom electronegativities; others are either nonpolar due to symmetry (e.g., O₂, He, N₂). 

\boxed{D}

The summary must be exactly TWO SENTENCES long—no more, no less—and contain only clinically/chemically relevant facts directly tied to the query regarding permanent dipoles.

Sentence 2: Why alternatives do not
